title: Senior Teacher - Quest Alliance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Quest Alliance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Senior Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
